purpose: Prerequisite videos for Grade 4 NCERT Chapter 6: Measuring Length
description: Videos covering: basic measurement concept, using a ruler, addition and subtraction for length calculations

videos.title: What is Measurement? | Introduction to Measuring for Kids
videos.description: Learn what measurement means and why we measure things. Understand that measurement tells us how long, how heavy, or how much something is.
learningObjectives: Know why we need standard units
Recognise different things we can measure

videos.title: How to Read a Ruler | Using a Ruler for Beginners
videos.description: Learn how to hold a ruler correctly, start measuring from zero, and read the markings. Perfect for beginners who are just starting to measure!
learningObjectives: Read centimetre markings on a ruler

videos.title: Adding and Subtracting Bigger Numbers | Addition and Subtraction Review
videos.description: Review adding and subtracting numbers up to 1000. You need these skills to solve length problems where you add or subtract measurements!
learningObjectives: Apply addition and subtraction to measurement problems

usageNotes.purpose: Review measurement basics, ruler use, and arithmetic before learning about measuring length in Chapter 6
usageNotes.recommendationStrategy: Select based on weak concepts identified in readiness assessment
usageNotes.sequencing: Measurement concept → Using a ruler → Addition and subtraction review
